song.title: I am Baptized
song.lyrics: [V1] .A E I won’t say good-bye . A B C#m E Or even think about all that I’ve left behind . A B This world is worthless in my mind . A E I’ve crossed the great divide . A B C#m E No looking back, there’s no way back to my old life . A B To Christ I come, to Christ I go… [C] . E C#m A I’ve died to this world, but then He’s raised me, . B E Lifted to the heavenlies . C#m A And there I find His perfect peace; . B E God and I live in harmony . C#m A B River of life, flowing freely . E C#m A Here I’ll drink, and drink, and drink, and drink from now .B E To eternity [V2] Raining day and night While waters rise, I’m safe inside my Christ the ark This world is buried ‘neath the dark I’ve stepped into the light His Word I see, I trace the rainbow through the sky To Christ I come, to Christ I go…
